name: cryptojs-rollup-bundle
description: CryptoJS bundled with Rollup for obfuscation and optimization

scripts.obfuscate: javascript-obfuscator dist/cryptojs.umd.js --output dist/cryptojs.umd.obfuscated.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --control-flow-flattening-threshold 1 --dead-code-injection true --dead-code-injection-threshold 1 --debug-protection true --debug-protection-interval true --disable-console-output true --domain-lock-redirect-url about:blank --identifier-names-generator hexadecimal --log false --numbers-to-expressions true --rename-globals true --rename-properties true --reserved-names [] --rotate-string-array true --seed 0 --self-defending true --shuffle-string-array true --split-strings true --split-strings-chunk-length 5 --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-index-shift true --string-array-rotate true --string-array-shuffle true --string-array-wrappers-count 5 --string-array-wrappers-chained-calls true --string-array-wrappers-parameters-max-count 5 --string-array-wrappers-type variable --string-array-threshold 1 --transform-object-keys true --unicode-escape-sequence true
scripts.build:super-obfuscated: rollup -c --environment NODE_ENV:production && npm run obfuscate-level1 && npm run obfuscate-level2
scripts.obfuscate-level1: javascript-obfuscator dist/cryptojs.umd.js --output dist/cryptojs.level1.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64
scripts.obfuscate-level2: javascript-obfuscator dist/cryptojs.level1.js --output dist/cryptojs.umd.obfuscated.js --compact true --rename-properties true --string-array-encoding rc4 --transform-object-keys true
